creator: exploringlondon
caption:
Did you know that you can see Queen Elizabeth’s clothing and accessories inside Buckingham Palace? At The King’s Gallery, there’s an incredible exhibition showcasing over 200 items, fabrics, samples, sketches and more, depicting a journey from her birth through her adulthood, from princess to Queen 👸 

📍 This is Queen Elizabeth II: Her Life in Style, at The King’s Gallery, Buckingham Palace
🎟️ Book your tickets on the @royalcollectiontrust website
🗓️ Open now until 18th October 2026

geo_locations: This is Queen Elizabeth II: Her Life in Style, at The King’s Gallery, Buckingham Palace
pinned_places: This is Queen Elizabeth II: Her Life in Style, at The King’s Gallery, Buckingham Palace

transcription.text: Did you know that you can go into Buckingham Palace and see Queen Elizabeth II's clothing and accessories displayed in an incredible exhibition? It's at the King's Gallery, Buckingham Palace, and it is the largest exhibition of Her Majesty's fashion ever staged with more than 200 items of clothing and accessories across all 10 decades of the late Queen's life. In what would have been her 100th year, it's a celebration of her iconic style all the way from birth to her adulthood. And with the accompanying audio guide, you'll learn about all of the details, the fabrics and the craftsmanship, the Queen's incredible wedding dress, the most glorious evening wear, every coloured hat and coat you could imagine, and so many more never before seen archival material like sketches and samples. This might be the last time we see many of these items, so it truly is a once-in-a-lifetime exhibition, so make sure you go and find all the details in the caption.
